title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Toko, Unknown person #2, Zoro, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us turn back the clock a little.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Laughter echoes out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the town that lives off the leftovers of the flower capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: EBSU Town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh! You're back, huh,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Tonyasu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yasuie! Welcome back, but we still don't got any food!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: gyahahaha! I'm starvin' to death out here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uh... Why is everyone so happy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The atmosphere's a bit different than leftover town in Kuri.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Iyo! What an eye you've got, mister! Everyone does seem to be having fun, don't they?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just that among all the animals on this green earth, the only one that can smile is man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: makes ya feel like Smilin', don't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Mom! I'm hungry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Me too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so nutrient deficient that my teeth are fallin' out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dahaha! ya don't need 'em anyway! There's nothin' to eat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Tonyasu! Who is this Ronin?!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He's got three swords in his belt!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're Right! Three of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And all of 'em are full length!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! Are you some kinda come- Dan! This is pretty funny! Wahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come, come now! This mister's fallen in love with me at first sight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, my! That's dangerous, you know! Hanging around this strange man!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, Oi! I'm the one and only grand taiko drummer, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whatever you say! Look at this scary face!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come on now, smile! Something good happened to this town today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's right! Guess what, tonyasu?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He came back last night! The OK-three boy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: oxf-free?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't know who he is or where he's from, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He appears in the dead of night, at the third hour of the OK,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Steals money from the evil, rich people of the capital,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and scatters it around the longhouses of the poor district!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who in the world is he, though?!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: I wish I could thank him! Hahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say fortune comes to a smiling family, don't they?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why we all went and bought a feast today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Here, a glass! Have some, Mr. Ronin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Clear Water!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We bought it with that money!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No, I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Your tummy won't hurt after, I promise!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Yasuie brought you here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So you must be a good person!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: drink up! Everyone's got the right to have some!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Clear Water! ]]

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Clear Water! )

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's yummy, isn't it? Soaks into ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Grin

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Come on, not that boring face again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't smile, fortune'll never come your way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I dunno... Smiling so much, in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: They call it the ebisu smile, mister!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: That's why this place is ebisu town!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We ain't gonna lose to poverty!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if we cry, we gotta smile! For good! ]]

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 58 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
